summary: Add an e2e test with stream=True to validate the new SSE default path, as none of the existing tests exercise this without stream_format='audio'.
Update the module docstring to indicate that raw audio streaming now requires stream_format='audio' instead of just stream=True.
Reword the test function's docstring from 'stream=True compatibility' to mention stream_format='audio' as the trigger.
Add a unit test for SSE rejection when sending stream=True with word_timestamps=True to cover the new validation path.
Add an integration test for SSE WAV streaming (stream=True, response_format='wav') mirroring test_streaming but with WAV format.
